_meta.note: All claims reference peer-reviewed or regulatory-approved sources. Not a substitute for medical advice.

key_studies.finding: Smoked/vaporized cannabis reduced neuropathic pain by ≥30% in 5/6 RCTs
Israeli retrospective: 81% of patients reported significant reduction in pain intensity
Patients switching from opioids to cannabis: 44% full cessation
16 RCTs (n=1750): moderate-quality evidence for pain reduction; NNT ~24
Inhaled THC:CBD 1:1 (nabiximols-like) outperformed THC-alone for neuropathic pain

thc_dominant.mechanism: CB1 agonism at spinal and supraspinal levels; inhibits pain neurotransmission via GABAergic modulation
thc_dominant.best_for: Neuropathic pain, spasm-related pain, breakthrough pain
thc_dominant.onset_route: Inhalation for acute; oil for maintenance
thc_dominant.caution: Psychoactive dose-dependent; tolerance develops; taper risk

balanced.mechanism: THC analgesia + CBD anti-inflammatory (PPARγ, 5-HT1A, TRP channels); entourage potentiates
balanced.best_for: Inflammatory pain, mixed nociceptive-neuropathic, opioid adjunct
balanced.rationale: Meta-analysis (Aviram 2022) shows balanced ratio reduces psychoactivity while maintaining analgesia

cbd_dominant.mechanism: Anti-inflammatory via TRPV1, 5-HT1A, PPARγ; indirect CB2 modulation
cbd_dominant.best_for: Inflammatory pain, fibromyalgia adjunct, elderly patients needing low psychoactivity
cbd_dominant.caution: Weaker analgesic than THC for acute nociceptive pain; slower onset

rationale.myrcene: Muscle relaxant, sedative, potentiates CB1 agonism; reduces spasm-related pain (Russo 2011)
rationale.caryophyllene: Selective CB2 agonist; anti-inflammatory via NF-κB inhibition; synergizes with THC (Bento et al. 2011)
rationale.linalool: Adenosine receptor modulation; reduces allodynia in animal models; anti-hyperalgesic (Peana et al. 2003)
rationale.humulene: Anti-inflammatory; synergizes with caryophyllene (Fernandes et al. 2007)
rationale.pinene: Acetylcholinesterase inhibitor; counteracts THC short-term memory effects; bronchodilator

nocturnal_pain.note: T22 or T20 at night for sleep + pain

genetics_guidance.profile_traits: High myrcene + high caryophyllene + moderate THC (15-22%) = optimal analgesic profile
avoid_lineages: Pure sativa high-limonene strains for pain (may increase alertness/anxiety)

indications.clinical_notes_he: מחקרים ישראליים (טיקון עולם, מרכז רפואי מאיר) מדגימים הפחתת כאב ב-81% מהמטופלים. יעיל במיוחד לכאב נוירופתי, כאב מסרטן ופיברומיאלגיה. שילוב עם CBD מפחית תופעות לוואי.

key_studies.finding: Israeli cohort n=2097: PTSD patients showed 82.5% reduction in symptom severity (PCL-5)
Reduced amygdala reactivity to trauma cues via CB1 upregulation in PTSD patients
Nabilone RCT: 28% reduction in nightmare frequency vs placebo

key_studies.ref: Roitman et al., J Clin Psychiatry 2014
key_studies.finding: Israeli open-label: THC reduced PTSD hyperarousal and sleep disturbance
Observational: 62% decrease in CAPS-5 scores over 8 weeks

thc_dominant.mechanism: CB1-mediated extinction of aversive memories (Marsicano 2002); suppresses REM nightmares; reduces amygdala hyperactivation
thc_dominant.best_for: Nightmares, hyperarousal, sleep onset, intrusive thoughts
thc_dominant.caution: High THC may WORSEN anxiety/paranoia in some patients; start low (T15) before escalating; morning use not recommended

balanced.mechanism: CBD modulates fear response via 5-HT1A serotonin receptors; potentiates endocannabinoid tone
balanced.best_for: Daytime anxiety component; patients with cannabis-induced anxiety history

cbd_dominant.mechanism: Anxiolytic via 5-HT1A agonism (Blessing et al. 2015, dose 300mg shown effective in simulated PTSD model); reduces cortisol
cbd_dominant.best_for: Anxiety-dominant PTSD without dissociation; daytime use; elderly veterans

rationale.linalool: GABA-A modulation (anxiolytic, sedative); reduces corticosterone stress response (Linck et al. 2009)
rationale.caryophyllene: Stress-anti-inflammatory; reduces anxiety-like behavior in CB2-dependent manner (Bahi et al. 2014)
rationale.limonene: 5-HT1A agonism; anxiolytic in low doses; may increase dopamine (use with caution in paranoia-prone)

nightmares_sleep.note: T22 or T20 oil 1-2h before sleep; suppresses REM nightmares

hyperarousal_acute.note: Low-dose inhaled balanced strain for panic episodes

daytime_anxiety.note: T1/C20 or T3/C15 during day to prevent flashbacks

genetics_guidance.profile_traits: High myrcene + high linalool + moderate-high THC (T20+) for nighttime; high CBD + linalool for daytime
genetics_guidance.israeli_specific: Tikun Olam's research strains developed specifically for PTSD veterans; coordinated with Israel MOH

indications.clinical_notes_he: המחקר הישראלי המוביל בעולם בתחום קנאביס ו-PTSD. המלצה: T22 בערב לסיוטים; T15 עם CBD ביום לחרדה. הישראל נאשמ׳ה (IMCA) אישרה PTSD כהתוויה ב-2014. חשוב: ועדת הטראומה הלאומית המליצה נגד — להציג שני הצדדים.

key_studies.ref: Abrams et al., J Pain Symptom Manage 2007
key_studies.finding: Smoked cannabis non-inferior to oxycodone for cancer pain; significant reduction in pain scores

key_studies.ref: Johnson et al., J Pain Symptom Manage 2010
key_studies.finding: Nabiximols vs THC vs placebo: nabiximols (balanced) significantly superior for cancer pain

key_studies.ref: Lichtman et al., J Pain Symptom Manage 2018
key_studies.finding: Nabiximols significantly improved pain in opioid-refractory cancer patients (n=397, Phase 3)
Preclinical: THC induced apoptosis in glioma cells; anti-angiogenic effects

key_studies.ref: Velasco et al., Expert Opin Ther Targets 2016
key_studies.finding: CB1+CB2 activation inhibits tumor growth in multiple cancer types (animal models)
Cannabinoids superior to prochlorperazine for chemotherapy-induced nausea/vomiting (CINV)

thc_dominant.mechanism: CB1 analgesia; appetite stimulation (ghrelin/CB1); antiemetic via dorsal vagal complex; anxiolytic
thc_dominant.best_for: Pain, CINV, appetite loss (cachexia), mood elevation in terminal patients
thc_dominant.caution: Can worsen anxiety; titrate carefully in opioid-naive patients

balanced.mechanism: CBD reduces pro-inflammatory cytokines (IL-6, TNF-α); synergistic CINV with THC; neuroprotective in chemo-neuropathy
balanced.best_for: CINV, neuropathic chemo pain, inflammation, quality of life
balanced.rationale: GW Pharma nabiximols data (1:1 THC:CBD) shows superior cancer pain relief vs THC alone

cbd_dominant.mechanism: Anti-inflammatory; anti-anxiety without psychoactivity; potential anti-tumor (in vitro: inhibits EGFR/VEGFR signaling)
cbd_dominant.best_for: Pediatric oncology, elderly patients, anxiety management, sleep

rationale.myrcene: Anti-mutagenic; anti-inflammatory; sedative for pain management; also potentiates THC anti-tumor effects (Russo 2011)
rationale.caryophyllene: Anti-tumor preclinical (NF-κB suppression); anti-inflammatory; pain relief via CB2
rationale.limonene: Anti-anxiety; apoptotic in breast cancer cells in vitro; immune modulation (d-limonene human trials by Miller 2011)
rationale.humulene: Anti-inflammatory; anti-proliferative (Legault & Pichette 2007); synergizes with caryophyllene

cinv_acute.note: For acute nausea during/after chemo; fastest antiemetic action

pain_chronic.note: Stable 24h coverage; combine with opioids under supervision

appetite.note: Low-dose THC oil before meals; T15/C3 preferred

sleep_pain.note: T22/C4 2h before bed for pain + sleep

genetics_guidance.profile_traits: For CINV: balanced ratio 1:1; for pain: THC-dominant indica; for quality of life: CBD-rich daytime

indications.clinical_notes_he: הנפוצה ביותר בישראל להתוויה ראשונה. רישיון ניתן בקלות יחסית לחולי סרטן. הדגש: בחילות וכאב — יעילות גבוהה עם ראיות טובות. ה-anti-tumor בבני אדם — ראיה קלינית חסרה עדיין.

key_studies.finding: CBD (Epidiolex 20mg/kg/day): 38.9% reduction in seizures vs placebo in Dravet syndrome (RCT, n=120)
Open-label CBD: 36.5% reduction in monthly motor seizures across 214 patients with treatment-resistant epilepsy
CBD (Epidiolex) in Lennox-Gastaut syndrome: 41.9% reduction in drop seizures vs 17.2% placebo (RCT n=225)
Comprehensive review: CBD best evidence for pediatric epilepsy syndromes
Israeli pediatric cohort: 43.3% responders (>50% seizure reduction) with CBD-rich cannabis

cbd_dominant.mechanism: Multiple: TRPV1 desensitization, 5-HT1A, adenosine A1 receptor; reduces neuroinflammation; modulates GPR55; voltage-gated Na+ channel block
cbd_dominant.best_for: Dravet syndrome, Lennox-Gastaut, TSC-associated seizures, CDKL5 deficiency
cbd_dominant.dosing_note: FDA-approved Epidiolex: start 2.5mg/kg/day → target 10-20mg/kg/day; Israeli products T0/C24 approximate equivalent
cbd_dominant.drug_interactions: Clobazam interaction: increases N-desmethylclobazam; may require benzodiazepine dose reduction (Gaston et al. 2017)

balanced.mechanism: THC at low doses modulates hyperexcitability via CB1; synergistic with CBD in refractory cases (Charlotte's Web evidence)
balanced.best_for: Adult refractory epilepsy; cases with pain or spasticity component (MS-epilepsy overlap)

thc_dominant.mechanism: Low-dose THC: anticonvulsant (CB1-mediated); high-dose THC: PRO-convulsant risk
thc_dominant.best_for: Adults only; specifically neuropathic pain + epilepsy comorbidity
thc_dominant.caution: AVOID in pediatric epilepsy; AVOID high THC — paradoxical seizure risk documented

rationale.linalool: Anticonvulsant in animal models (Elisabetsky et al. 1999); GABA-A potentiation; used in traditional medicine for seizures
rationale.myrcene: GABAergic sedation; reduces neuronal excitability indirectly
rationale.caryophyllene: Anti-inflammatory; reduces neuroinflammation in epilepsy models

pediatric.note: ONLY oil/extract for children; NEVER smoking/vaping; calibrated dosing critical

adult_maintenance.note: Consistent absorption essential; avoid variable inhalation dosing for seizure control

rescue.note: For seizure rescue, specialized formulations needed; cannabis not appropriate as acute rescue alone

genetics_guidance.profile_traits: Minimum CBD:THC ratio of 10:1 for pediatric; for adults 4:1 acceptable

indications.clinical_notes_he: הראיה החזקה ביותר לשימוש רפואי — CBD ב-Dravet ו-Lennox-Gastaut. ב-2020 הגיש IMCA אפידיולקס לאישור ישיר. מחקר ישראלי בבית חולים שיבא מראה 43% מגיבים. חשוב: אינטראקציה עם קלובזאם — הפנה לנוירולוג.

key_studies.ref: Naftali et al., Isr Med Assoc J 2011
key_studies.finding: Israeli pilot: 30% Crohn's remission with smoked cannabis vs 10% placebo; significant reduction in Harvey-Bradshaw score

key_studies.ref: Naftali et al., Clin Gastroenterol Hepatol 2013
key_studies.finding: Cannabis vapor induced clinical remission in 45% vs 10% placebo (RCT, n=21); no endoscopic remission

key_studies.ref: Naftali et al., United European Gastroenterol J 2021
key_studies.finding: CBD-dominant cannabis: improved quality of life but did not induce remission vs placebo

key_studies.ref: De Filippis et al., PLoS ONE 2011
key_studies.finding: CBD reduced intestinal inflammation (animal); decreased calprotectin

key_studies.ref: Storr et al., Dig Liver Dis 2014
key_studies.finding: Canadian survey: 32% Crohn's patients used cannabis; 83% reported benefit

thc_dominant.mechanism: CB1 in enteric nervous system: reduces gut motility, pain, cramping; anti-secretory effect; reduces pro-inflammatory cytokines (TNF-α, IL-1β)
thc_dominant.best_for: Acute flares, abdominal pain, diarrhea, appetite loss; temporary remission induction
thc_dominant.caution: No proven mucosal healing; should not replace biologics/steroids; only adjunct

balanced.mechanism: CBD anti-inflammatory (enteric glia, CB2, PPARγ); THC motility control; combined: superior symptom control

cbd_dominant.mechanism: CB2-mediated immune modulation in gut mucosa; anti-inflammatory without psychoactivity
cbd_dominant.best_for: Pediatric IBD, daytime use, maintenance between flares
cbd_dominant.note: Naftali 2021 CBD-only RCT: improved QoL but NOT endoscopic remission — manage expectations

rationale.caryophyllene: CB2 agonism in gut immune cells; directly anti-inflammatory in colitis models (Bento et al. 2011); reduces IL-6, TNF-α
rationale.humulene: Potent anti-inflammatory; anti-proliferative in inflamed tissue; synergizes with caryophyllene
rationale.limonene: Anti-anxiety (stress worsens IBD flares); gastroprotective properties

acute_flare_pain.note: Fastest pain + cramp relief; avoid smoking (GI irritation risk)

maintenance.note: Twice-daily dosing for consistent enteric cannabinoid levels

nausea.note: Pre-meal cannabis for appetite and nausea

genetics_guidance.profile_traits: High caryophyllene + humulene profile essential; indica-dominant preferred for motility control

indications.clinical_notes_he: מחקר פורץ דרך מבית חולים מאיר (פרופ׳ נפתלי) — עיקרי העולם בקנאביס ו-IBD. ממצא עיקרי: הפחתת סימפטומים כן, ריפוי ריריות — לא עדיין. אל תחליף טיפולים ביולוגיים. יעיל מאוד כתוסף לכאב ואיכות חיים.

key_studies.finding: Nabiximols (Sativex) RCT: significant reduction in central neuropathic pain and sleep disturbance in MS (n=66)

key_studies.ref: Collin et al., Eur J Neurol 2010
key_studies.finding: Nabiximols: 28% reduction in spasticity Likert score vs placebo (n=337, Phase 3)
Cannabis oromucosal spray improved spasticity, pain, sleep, bladder control in 160 MS patients
Oral dronabinol did not slow disability progression but reduced spasticity
Israeli MS cohort: 53% reduction in spasticity VAS; 43% pain reduction with inhaled cannabis

balanced.mechanism: Nabiximols (1:1 THC:CBD) is EMA-approved for MS spasticity; CBD reduces neuroinflammation (oligodendrocyte protection)
balanced.note: GW Pharma Sativex (nabiximols) specifically approved for MS spasticity in EU/Canada — strongest regulatory evidence

thc_dominant.mechanism: CB1 in spinal cord motor neurons: reduces spasm frequency; anti-nociceptive

cbd_dominant.mechanism: Neuroprotective via antioxidant; reduces microglial activation; PPARγ myelination support
cbd_dominant.best_for: Neuroinflammatory component; early relapsing-remitting MS; fatigue

rationale.myrcene: Muscle relaxant; reduces spasticity frequency in models
rationale.caryophyllene: Neuroprotective via CB2 in microglia; reduces neuroinflammation in MS models (Granja et al. 2012)
rationale.linalool: Reduces spasm-related anxiety; GABAergic relaxation; adenosine A1 anti-nociception
rationale.pinene: Bronchodilator (important for respiratory MS patients); acetylcholinesterase inhibition may help cognition

spasticity_breakthrough.note: Rapid spasm relief; preferred over smoking in MS (respiratory sensitivity)

bladder.note: CBD-dominant daytime; may reduce neurogenic bladder overactivity

genetics_guidance.profile_traits: Balanced THC:CBD (1:1 to 1:2) for spasticity per Sativex evidence; high myrcene + caryophyllene

indications.clinical_notes_he: Sativex (ממשרד הבריאות הישראלי: תרסיס פה) — מאושר בישראל לספסטיות MS. ראיה רגולטורית חזקה. מחקר ישראלי (מאיר, שיבא) תומך בשאיפה ובשמן. ספסטיות > כאב > שינה — הסדר עדיפויות.

key_studies.ref: Babson et al., Curr Psychiatry Rep 2017
key_studies.finding: Systematic review: THC reduces sleep onset latency but may suppress REM; CBD has wake-promoting at low doses, sleep-promoting at high doses
CBD 25-175mg: 66.7% improved sleep scores in anxiety/sleep cohort within 1 month
Inhaled cannabis: 70% reported short-term sleep improvement; tolerance developed in frequent users

key_studies.ref: Gates et al., Sleep Med Rev 2014
key_studies.finding: THC reduces sleep latency but REM suppression with chronic use; CBD may counteract REM effects of THC

thc_dominant.mechanism: CB1-mediated sedation; reduces sleep latency (adenosine buildup); suppresses REM (nightmare reduction in PTSD); increases slow-wave sleep
thc_dominant.best_for: Sleep onset problems, PTSD nightmares, chronic pain insomnia
thc_dominant.caution: Tolerance to sleep effects develops in 2-4 weeks; REM suppression long-term may impair memory consolidation; taper needed

balanced.mechanism: CBD counteracts REM suppression of THC; combined: better sleep architecture than THC alone

cbd_dominant.mechanism: High-dose CBD (160mg+) decreases wakefulness; anxiolytic reduces bedtime anxiety; 5-HT1A modulation
cbd_dominant.best_for: Anxiety-driven insomnia, REM behavior disorder, daytime fatigue without sedation
cbd_dominant.note: Low-dose CBD (under 25mg) may be alerting; dose must be sufficient for sleep (typically 50-150mg for oil)

rationale.myrcene: Most potent sedative terpene; muscle relaxant; onset of sedation 30 min post-inhalation in studies (Russo 2011); indica-dominant strains highest myrcene
rationale.linalool: Promotes parasympathetic activation; reduces cortisol; anxiolytic-sedative synergy with THC
rationale.terpinolene: Sedative in animal models; found in OG Kush lineage; synergistic with myrcene

sleep_onset.note: Take 1-2h before target sleep time; T20 or T22 oil

sleep_maintenance.note: Larger oil dose (more mg) for all-night coverage vs inhalation (shorter duration)

nap_daytime.note: Only for shift workers or medical need; CBD-dominant preferred

genetics_guidance.profile_traits: Indica-dominant; myrcene >0.5%; avoid high limonene/pinene (alerting terpenes); T20+ THC

indications.clinical_notes_he: שמן T20 או T22 שעתיים לפני שינה — המלצה מרכזית. מיסן גבוה = שינה טובה יותר. ל-PTSD: T22 לדיכוי סיוטים. אזהרה: סבילות מתפתחת תוך שבועות — פרוסה 1-2 פעמים/שבוע עדיפה על שימוש יומי.

key_studies.finding: CBD preclinical/clinical review: anxiolytic at multiple doses; effective for social anxiety (SPA simulated public speaking, n=24)

key_studies.ref: Zuardi et al., Braz J Psychiatry 2017
key_studies.finding: CBD 300mg single dose: significantly reduced anxiety in simulated public speaking vs placebo
In humans, THC INCREASES anxiety dose-dependently above 5-7.5mg equivalent; CBD attenuates this
Israeli observational: CBD-dominant use associated with 58% reduction in anxiety scores; THC-dominant higher anxiety risk

cbd_dominant.mechanism: 5-HT1A partial agonism (buspirone-like); adenosine A2A modulation; TRPV1 desensitization; indirect endocannabinoid enhancement
cbd_dominant.best_for: GAD, social anxiety, panic disorder; daytime use; pediatric anxiety
cbd_dominant.note: Not approved by FDA/EMA for anxiety specifically but substantial evidence base; Israeli MOH allows for anxiety as secondary indication

balanced.mechanism: CBD's anxiolytic counteracts THC's anxiogenic potential; low-dose THC (below threshold) adds mood elevation
balanced.best_for: Mild anxiety + mood depression comorbidity; low THC-experience patients

thc_dominant.mechanism: ONLY at very low doses (<5mg THC): anxiolytic via endocannabinoid system normalization
thc_dominant.best_for: Patients who have proven tolerance and need mood component
thc_dominant.caution: HIGH RISK: THC above 5-7.5mg dose INCREASES anxiety/paranoia dose-dependently; contraindicated for anxiety-primary use without CBD buffer

rationale.linalool: GABA-A modulation (benzodiazepine-like without dependence risk); reduces cortisol in stress models; anxiolytic in multiple human aromatherapy studies
rationale.limonene: 5-HT1A agonism; increases brain serotonin (Russo 2011); mood-elevating; anti-anxiety in animal studies; small human trials positive
rationale.caryophyllene: CB2 reduces stress-induced neuroinflammation; anti-anxiety without psychoactivity (Bahi et al. 2014)

acute_anxiety.note: CBD-dominant oil under tongue; faster than oral

social_performance.note: 300mg CBD studied for performance anxiety; Israeli doses typically 50-150mg

daily_maintenance.note: Twice daily CBD oil; consistent level more important than peak dose

avoid.note: High-dose THC inhalation is PRIMARY CAUSE of cannabis-induced anxiety/panic attacks

genetics_guidance.profile_traits: High linalool + limonene; CBD:THC >10:1; avoid high-THC sativas with high limonene (stimulating not calming)

indications.clinical_notes_he: CBD — הראיה הטובה ביותר מבין ההתוויות לשימוש יומיומי. T1/C20 עד T3/C15 ביום — בטוח גם לנהיגה (בכפוף להוראות רופא). THC בכמות גבוהה = גרימת חרדה — לא טיפול. מדגישים: להסביר למטופל שחרדה אחרי קנאביס = מינון THC גבוה מדי.

key_studies.ref: Habib & Artul, Rambam Maimonides Med J 2018
key_studies.finding: Israeli cohort n=26: cannabis use in fibromyalgia; significant reduction in pain (NRS -32%), sleep improvement, morning stiffness reduction

key_studies.ref: Van de Donk et al., Pain 2019
key_studies.finding: Dutch RCT n=20: vaporized cannabis (THC:CBD variants) vs placebo; all active arms improved pain; balanced ratio best-tolerated
Nabilone RCT: significant fibromyalgia symptom improvement vs placebo; reduced pain, sleep disturbance, anxiety
Nabilone double-blind RCT n=40: NRS pain score decreased by 2.04 in nabilone arm vs 0.47 placebo; FIQ improved significantly

key_studies.ref: Sagy et al., J Clin Med 2019
key_studies.finding: Israeli MOH database n=367: 81.1% fibromyalgia patients reported treatment success; THC-dominant associated with higher response rates

thc_dominant.mechanism: CB1-mediated modulation of central sensitization in thalamus and anterior cingulate cortex (the neurological substrate of fibromyalgia); reduces allodynia via spinal cord CB1; sleep improvement (critical in fibromyalgia — disrupted sleep perpetuates pain cycle)
thc_dominant.best_for: Nighttime pain, allodynia, central sensitization, disrupted sleep, morning stiffness
thc_dominant.caution: High THC may worsen cognitive fog (fibro fog) in some patients; start very low; morning use not recommended

balanced.mechanism: THC central analgesia + CBD anti-inflammatory (PPARγ) + CBD reduces THC cognitive side effects; balanced optimal for daytime pain management without impairing cognition
balanced.best_for: Daytime pain, fibromyalgia fatigue, anxiety comorbidity (very common in fibromyalgia), IBS comorbidity

cbd_dominant.mechanism: PPARγ agonism reduces systemic inflammation; 5-HT1A anxiolytic; indirect enhancement of endocannabinoid tone (inhibition of FAAH); reduces comorbid anxiety
cbd_dominant.best_for: Fibromyalgia with anxiety/depression comorbidity; patients unable to tolerate THC psychoactivity; adjunct to medications

rationale.myrcene: Muscle relaxant; reduces allodynia and central sensitization in animal models; deep sedative for sleep restoration (critical in fibromyalgia management — sleep deprivation is a primary driver)
rationale.caryophyllene: CB2 agonism reduces neuroinflammation; anti-inflammatory via NF-κB; fibromyalgia has emerging neuroinflammatory component (Albrecht et al. 2013 — microglial activation in fibromyalgia PET)
rationale.linalool: GABAergic anxiolytic; reduces cortisol; fibromyalgia strongly correlated with dysautonomia and HPA-axis hyperactivation — linalool directly targets this pathway
rationale.bisabolol: Anti-nociceptive via TRPA1; anti-inflammatory; supportive anti-irritant terpene for widespread pain
rationale.humulene: Anti-inflammatory synergy with caryophyllene; appetite modulation (fibromyalgia patients often have appetite disruption)

nighttime_pain_sleep.note: T20 or T22 oil 1-2h before sleep; targets sleep disruption which perpetuates fibromyalgia pain cycle

daytime_pain.note: Low-dose balanced or T15 for breakthrough pain episodes; avoid high THC during work hours

maintenance.note: Balanced T10/C10 oil twice daily; most evidence-backed approach for fibromyalgia maintenance (Van de Donk 2019)

preferred_lineages: OG Kush (high myrcene + caryophyllene; proven analgesic)
Granddaddy Purple (sleep + deep body relaxation; high myrcene + linalool)
Girl Scout Cookies (high caryophyllene — neuroinflammation target)
Critical Mass (CBD buffer; heavy body effect)
genetics_guidance.profile_traits: High myrcene (>0.4%) + high caryophyllene (>0.3%) + moderate-high THC (T15-22) for nighttime; balanced or CBD-dominant for daytime cognition preservation
avoid_lineages: High-terpinolene sativas (stimulating; exacerbates fibro-fog and anxiety)
High-limonene strains with high THC (anxiety paradox risk in sensitized patients)

indications.clinical_notes_he: ישראל מובילת מחקר: מחקר Sagy 2019 (n=367) — 81% הצלחה. הדגש הטיפולי: שינה + כאב ב-T20 ערב, CBD ביום. פיברומיאלגיה = כאב מרכזי; לא דלקת פריפרית — לכן THC על-שדרתי עדיף. אזהרה: ערפל קוגניטיבי (fibro-fog) מחמיר ב-THC גבוה — להתחיל T10, להתקדם בזהירות.

key_studies.finding: Israeli study (Shaare Zedek) n=53 ASD children: CBD:THC 20:1 oil; self-injury/rage improved in 67.6%, anxiety improved in 47.1%, communication improved in 47.1%

key_studies.ref: Bar-Lev Schleider et al., Sci Rep 2019
key_studies.finding: Israeli prospective study n=188 ASD children: 6-month cannabis treatment; 30.1% significant improvement, 53.7% moderate improvement in problem behaviors
Placebo-controlled RCT n=150 ASD children: CBD+THC (20:1) significantly improved social responsiveness scale; reduced problematic behavior vs placebo (p=0.003)
Brazilian cohort n=18 ASD adults: CBD-enriched cannabis; 61% improvement in communication, 50% stereotypy reduction
Double-blind UK study: CBD normalized glutamate (Glx)/GABA ratios in ASD brains — first neurochemical mechanism confirmation in humans

cbd_dominant.mechanism: CBD normalizes GABA/glutamate imbalance (Pretzsch 2019); reduces neuroinflammation via CB2 and PPARγ; 5-HT1A agonism improves social behavior in animal models (Zirlinger et al. 2001); modulates oxytocin pathway; reduces amygdala hyperactivation to social stimuli
cbd_dominant.best_for: Core ASD symptoms: social withdrawal, communication deficits, repetitive behaviors, self-injurious behavior, rage episodes
cbd_dominant.dosing_note: Pediatric: start 1mg/kg/day CBD; titrate to 10-20mg/kg/day; Israeli protocols typically 20:1 CBD:THC minimum; adult dosing less established
cbd_dominant.caution: Drug interactions: CBD inhibits CYP2D6 and CYP3A4; monitor dosing of common ASD medications (risperidone, aripiprazole, sertraline, valproate)

balanced.mechanism: Low-dose THC in entourage with CBD may enhance CB1 modulation of GABA circuits; only for adult ASD patients with comorbid anxiety or sleep disorder
balanced.best_for: Adult ASD with anxiety, sleep disorder, or pain comorbidity; NOT recommended for pediatric
balanced.caution: THC may increase stereotypy or anxiety in ASD patients; use only under specialist supervision; never first-line in ASD

rationale.linalool: GABA-A modulation directly targets the GABA/glutamate imbalance underlying ASD; anxiolytic without psychoactivity; reduces sensory hyperreactivity indirectly via GABA normalization
rationale.limonene: 5-HT1A agonism; serotonergic modulation is directly relevant (serotonin system is dysregulated in ASD — elevated blood serotonin in 30-40% of patients); mood-lifting without THC-related risks
rationale.caryophyllene: CB2-mediated neuroinflammation reduction; ASD shows microglial activation and neuroinflammatory markers (Vargas et al. 2005); CB2 agonism addresses this component without psychoactivity
rationale.bisabolol: Anti-inflammatory; skin-soothing (relevant for ASD patients with sensory hypersensitivity and skin-picking behaviors); mild anxiolytic
rationale.myrcene: Sedative for sleep disorders (extremely common in ASD — affects 50-80% of children); muscle relaxation

pediatric.note: ONLY CBD-dominant oil for children (T0-T3/C15-C24); precise weight-based dosing; never smoking/vaping in ASD pediatric; start very low and titrate slowly

adult_maintenance.note: CBD-dominant sublingual oil; twice daily for behavioral consistency; consistent dosing critical — peaks and troughs worsen ASD behavior patterns

sleep_specific.note: Higher evening CBD dose for sleep onset (common ASD comorbidity); myrcene-rich strain preferred

caregiver_alert.note: ALWAYS involve treating physician; ASD patients have complex medication regimens with significant drug interaction risk for cannabis

preferred_lineages: Avidekel by Tikun Olam (used in Israeli ASD research)
genetics_guidance.profile_traits: Maximum CBD:THC ratio for pediatric (20:1 minimum); high linalool + limonene terpene profile; avoid high-myrcene sedating strains for daytime use (risk of excessive sedation in school-age children)
genetics_guidance.israeli_specific: Israel is global leader in ASD cannabis research — Aran et al. (2021) RCT is the highest-quality pediatric ASD cannabis trial worldwide; Shaare Zedek and Soroka Medical Center ASD cannabis clinics active

indications.clinical_notes_he: ישראל חלוצה עולמית: RCT ראשון בעולם על קנאביס ו-ASD (Aran 2021) — ביה״ח שאערי צדק + מאיר. 20:1 CBD:THC שמן — הפרוטוקול הסטנדרטי. 67.6% שיפור ב-self-injury. חשוב: אינטראקציות תרופתיות — ריספרידון, ולפרואט, SSRI — לבדוק CYP לפני מתן.

key_studies.finding: Israeli open-label (n=22): cannabis improved motor score (UPDRS) 30.6% after 30 minutes of smoking
CBD 75-300mg/day for 6 weeks: improved Parkinson's patients' well-being and QoL; reduced psychosis in 300mg group
CBD case series (n=6): significant improvement in psychosis symptoms associated with Parkinson's

key_studies.ref: Balash et al., J Neural Transm 2017
key_studies.finding: Israeli cross-sectional: 46% PD patients used cannabis; pain and sleep improved; no motor worsening

balanced.mechanism: CBD neuroprotective (antioxidant, GPR6 inverse agonism in basal ganglia); THC dopaminergic modulation; combined reduces tremor + anxiety
balanced.best_for: Tremor, rigidity, sleep, pain, anxiety; balanced preferred for motor symptoms

cbd_dominant.mechanism: GPR6 allosteric modulation in substantia nigra; neuroprotective; reduces Lewy body pathology in animal models (Fernandez-Ruiz 2011); treats PD psychosis
cbd_dominant.best_for: PD psychosis/hallucinations, REM sleep behavior disorder (common in PD), anxiety, neuroprotection

thc_dominant.mechanism: CB1 in basal ganglia: acute motor improvement (Lotan study); pain; night rigidity
thc_dominant.caution: May worsen dyskinesias; confusion risk in elderly; start very low

rationale.linalool: Neuroprotective; anti-Parkinsonian in models; GABA modulation reduces tremor-anxiety cycle
rationale.pinene: Acetylcholinesterase inhibition may support cholinergic balance (relevant to PD cognitive symptoms)

motor_acute.note: Rapid tremor relief; Israeli study used smoked cannabis (Lotan 2014)

maintenance.note: CBD-dominant oil for daily neuroprotection + sleep + REM disorder

psychosis.note: CBD-dominant ONLY for PD psychosis; THC may worsen hallucinations

genetics_guidance.profile_traits: Balanced-to-CBD-dominant; high linalool; low THC for daily use; higher THC only for off-period nighttime dosing

indications.clinical_notes_he: ישראל חלוצה: מחקר לוטן (2014) מבית הספר לרפואה מרכזי. לא מחליף ל-dopaminergic treatment. CBD לפסיכוזה של פרקינסון — ראיה קלינית יפה. REM sleep disorder נפוץ ב-PD — T1/C20 לפני שינה.
